58:  * @param routeName - The name of the route for logging purposes
59:  * @returns A NextResponse with a standardized error payload

63:  * - 401 -> 502 (upstream auth failure)
64:  * - 403 with rate limit -> 429 RATE_LIMITED
65:  * - 403 without rate limit -> 403 FORBIDDEN
66:  * - 404 -> 404 NOT_FOUND

71: export function handleCodyApiError(

      - name: Upload Playwright report
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:

      - name: Upload test results

        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
